body: Let's plan the CSV export feature for the reports page. Can you break it into tasks?
Tasks: an export button, a loading state, and a success toast. Design, where should the button sit?
Put the Export button at the top-right of the reports toolbar, with a spinner while the file is generated.
I implemented the export endpoint and the button. The PR is up. Could you review the streaming logic?
Looks good. I just renamed one helper. QA, please test exporting a large report and an empty one.
Both cases pass. The empty report exports a header-only file. Ops, can we enable it on staging?
Enabled it on staging. Docs, could you add a short how-to for the export button?
I documented the export button and added a short how-to to the user guide.
Thanks, everyone. CSV export is ready to ship in the next release.
